posts.author: Keira76 (Keira Vallejo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please can we hide workspaces in the left menu. They are messy and distracting to me. I only want to see my favourites. I am not an admin and can not control what appears in the menu but whenever another colleague expands the submenus in workspaces, they expand for me. I spend all day clicking the three dots, sort workspace and collapse all folders. Minimising the menu is a temporary solution but I need it open to switch between the boards in my favourites.

What are you trying to achieve

A tidy UI so I can focus and not be distracted by the clutter
